name: Omega Therapeutics Inc. Common Stock
summary: Omega Therapeutics, Inc. is a genomic medicines company pioneering a new class of programmable epigenetic medicines, and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA. The company's OMEGA Epigenomic Programming platform enables targeted modulation of gene expression by controlling Insulated Genomic Domains (IGDs) to treat and cure diseases. Their technology is designed to target specific genes without altering the underlying DNA sequence.
